name: NGO Management
description: Complete NGO and non-profit management — manage projects, track donors, register beneficiaries, and generate impact reports with budget transparency.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchProjects
capabilities.description: Search for projects by name, status, or sector

capabilities.name: createDonor
capabilities.description: Register a new donor with contribution history

capabilities.name: getBeneficiary
capabilities.description: Get beneficiary profile with project assignments and aid received

capabilities.name: updateProject
capabilities.description: Update project details, budget, or timeline

capabilities.name: getReport
capabilities.description: Get project report with impact metrics and financials

capabilities.name: searchBeneficiaries
capabilities.description: Search beneficiaries by name, location, or project

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read NGO data including projects, donors, and beneficiaries

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update projects, donors, beneficiaries, and reports

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete projects, donor records, and beneficiary registrations

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full NGO administration including budget allocation and reporting
